# Phase 1 — boundary with one curved edge. Exercises:
#   - arc directive inside a polygon body
#   - arc discretization during pipeline run
#   - polygon-info assertion against the pre-discretized sketch

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0) arc=-0.375
(200,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,160), area 32000

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 61
faces: 4 (boundary: 1, interior: 3)
graph: 12 vertices, 15 edges (perimeter: 12, interior: 3)
regions: 1
